label: Stat part (stuff)
description: Scales the stat based on a stuff-material stat and an optional multiplier stat.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

stuffPowerStat.label: Stuff power stat
stuffPowerStat.description: StatDef read from the stuff material that provides the base power value.

multiplierStat.label: Multiplier stat
multiplierStat.description: StatDef read from the stuff material used as an additional multiplier.
